title: IIT Indore – Junior Research Fellow – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has released a recruitment notification for 2 posts including Junior Research Fellow (JRF) - 2 for candidates with ME/M.Tech or equivalent in relevant specialization or BE/B.Tech in relevant engineering branch with one year experience, and candidates can apply online from 15 May 2026 to 30 May 2026 at iiti.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech or equivalent in relevant area of specialization, BE/B.Tech Degree in relevant branch of engineering from a recognized university/institution with at least one year of experience (after completion of BE/BTech)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
